ddls:
CREATE TABLE "radio_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radio station */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Broadcast frequency of the station */,
  "callsign" TEXT /* Callsign assigned to the station */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of programming offered by the station */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from a specified point in miles */,
  "city_of_license" TEXT /* City where the station is licensed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station's location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the station */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the station's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licensing" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the radio station */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number issued to the station */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the license will expire */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the license (e.g., Active, Expired) */,
  "renewal_period" INTEGER /* Period after which the license needs to be renewed */,
  "licensing_officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer who issued the license */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal process (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licensing_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES radio_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licensing_licensing_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("licensing_officer_id") REFERENCES staff_members ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broadcasts" (
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broadcast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the radio station */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the broadcast */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the broadcast */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program being aired */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the broadcast (e.g., Live, Pre-recorded) */,
  "broadcast_date" TEXT /* Date of the broadcast */,
  "audience_size" INTEGER /* Estimated number of listeners for the broadcast */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the broadcast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broadcast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broadcasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES radio_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the radio station */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance assessment */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Result of the compliance assessment (e.g., Compliant, Non-compliant) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes regarding compliance */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inspector who conducted the compliance check */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., Regular, Special) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES staff_members ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES radio_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_members" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the radio station managed */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Manager, Technician) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supervisor of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_members_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES staff_members ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_members_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES radio_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audience_reach" (
  "reach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audience reach record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the radio station */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year when the survey was conducted */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the survey was conducted */,
  "estimated_listeners" INTEGER /* Estimated number of listeners */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the audience survey was conducted */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method used for the survey (e.g., Phone, Online) */,
  "survey_sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the survey */,
  "survey_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audience_reach_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES radio_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the radio station submitting the report */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Annual, Quarterly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report (e.g., Q1, Annual) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Submitted, Approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES radio_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewal_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the radio station */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "renewal_due_date" TEXT /* Due date for license renewal */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Acknowledged) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who sent the notification */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who acknowledged the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewal_notifications_acknowledged_by FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by") REFERENCES staff_members ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewal_notifications_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES radio_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewal_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES staff_members ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broadcast_complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the radio station the complaint is about */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was received */,
  "complaint_type" TEXT /* Type of complaint (e.g., Signal Issues, Content Issues) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint (e.g., Open, Resolved) */,
  "complainant_name" TEXT /* Name of the complainant */,
  "complainant_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the complainant */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was resolved */,
  "resolution_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broadcast_complaints_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES radio_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broadcast_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the radio station */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for the broadcast */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the broadcast */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the broadcast */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program being aired */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "program_host" TEXT /* Name of the program host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broadcast_schedules_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES radio_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "city_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "city_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "city_zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_city_name FOREIGN KEY ("city_name") REFERENCES radio_stations ("city_of_license")
)
